nasb.text: Thus the Lord spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the first month of the second year after they had come out of the land of Egypt, saying,

esv.text: And the Lord spoke to Moses in the wilderness of Sinai, in the first month of the second year after they had come out of the land of Egypt, saying,

cnv.text: 以色列人出埃及地以後，第二年正月，耶和華在西奈曠野吩咐摩西說：

ccb.text: 以色列人离开埃及后第二年的一月，耶和华在西奈旷野对摩西说：
